_comment: Sync receipt for docs/reference/data/. Captures the source-of-truth read at last sync. The engine-version field that used to live here was retired 2026-05-16 — gql-conformance.json no longer carries a version pin, the dashboard no longer renders one, and lint-version-literals.py no longer allowlists this file. See docs/reference/versioning for the full version chain.
